steps.title: Identify what the passage explicitly states about the founding purpose
steps.content: The passage states directly that Okeke and her team founded U-recycle Initiative Africa “to teach young people how their actions affect the environment and why recycling is important.” The question asks for one reason given in the text, so the answer must match this stated purpose word-for-word or in close paraphrase.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘To bring attention to overlooked African artists’: The passage mentions an exhibit of art made from recycled materials, but the purpose was environmental education, not spotlighting artists. Not supported by the text. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘To teach young people why recycling is important’: This is a direct restatement of one of the two founding purposes given in the passage. ✓
  • Choice C — ‘To help adults gain important outdoor skills’: The passage targets young people, not adults, and mentions no outdoor skills. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘To give teenagers advice about starting businesses’: The passage says nothing about business advice; Okeke founded the organization as a teenager but the organization’s purpose is environmental education. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
